title: Crispy British Sugared Almonds Fried
description: This dish features a floral and flaky flavor profile with each piece having a delicate crunch from being fried in sugar syrup.
instructions: Preheat a large pan over medium heat.
In a small saucepan, combine water and sugar. Stir until sugar is fully dissolved.
Add almonds to the syrup mixture and stir gently to coat evenly. Cover and cook for about 5-7 minutes or until almonds are lightly browned and caramelized.
Remove from heat and allow almonds to cool slightly before transferring them to a wire rack to dry completely.
